summary: Testing completed for Daily Report Email Settings feature. All backend APIs and frontend UI elements are working correctly. The daily_report_enabled switch and daily_report_time input are present in the Settings page and settings persist correctly.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements present and functional

api_get_settings_daily_report_fields.description: GET /api/settings returns daily_report_enabled and daily_report_time fields

api_post_settings_email_with_daily_repor.description: POST /api/settings/email accepts and saves daily_report_enabled and daily_report_time

api_settings_persistence.description: Settings are persisted per user (user_id field present)

frontend_daily_report_switch.description: Daily Task Report switch visible in Settings page with data-testid='daily-report-enabled-switch'

frontend_time_input_conditional.description: Time input field appears when daily report is enabled with data-testid='daily-report-time-input'

scheduler_implementation.note: APScheduler is configured to run send_daily_reports_job at minute=0 of every hour. The job checks for users with daily_report_enabled=true and sends reports based on their daily_report_time setting. SMTP credentials must be configured for emails to be sent.

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Daily Report Email feature is fully implemented and tested. Backend has EmailSettings model with daily_report_enabled (bool) and daily_report_time (string like '08:00'). Frontend Settings.jsx has UI elements with data-testid='daily-report-enabled-switch' and data-testid='daily-report-time-input'. Scheduler runs hourly to check and send reports.
